title: achillea umbellata subsp. monocephala
intro: Achillea umbellata subsp. monocephala, also known as the single-headed yarrow, is a subspecies of the yarrow plant, characterized by its unique single stem and white or pink flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps. The health benefits of Achillea umbellata subsp. monocephala include its ability to improve digestion, boost the immune system, and reduce stress and anxiety. Achillea umbellata subsp. monocephala can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
